title: Cụm động từ (2) — Luyện tập
summary: 5 bộ bài tập trắc nghiệm luyện tập Phrasal Verbs: điền giới từ, chọn cụm động từ đúng, giải nghĩa phrasal verbs trong ngữ cảnh.

sections.heading: Hướng dẫn làm bài
sections.body:
## Luyện tập Cụm động từ

Phần này gồm **5 bộ bài tập** trắc nghiệm giúp bạn ôn luyện các cụm động từ đã học ở phần Lý thuyết.

### Các dạng bài:
- **Điền giới từ / tiểu từ** thích hợp vào chỗ trống
- **Chọn phrasal verb** phù hợp với ngữ cảnh
- **Giải nghĩa** phrasal verb trong câu

### Mẹo làm bài:
1. Đọc kỹ toàn bộ câu trước khi chọn đáp án
2. Chú ý ngữ cảnh — cùng một động từ nhưng giới từ khác nhau sẽ cho nghĩa hoàn toàn khác
3. Xem lại phần giải thích sau mỗi câu để ghi nhớ tốt hơn

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Cụm Động Từ 1
exerciseSets.description: 26 câu — account for, break down, bring up, carry off, come between, dispose of, dream up...

exercises.question: Can you account ………….all the money you've spent since you arrived?
exercises.explanation: account for sth = giải thích cho việc gì.

exercises.question: Since it's important, would you attend ………..that matter right away?
exercises.explanation: attend to sth = tập trung, giải quyết việc gì.

exercises.question: Beware …………..pickpockets!
exercises.explanation: beware of sb/sth = cảnh giác, cẩn thận với ai/cái gì.

exercises.question: If you don't see what you want in our window, ask……..it
exercises.explanation: ask for sth = yêu cầu, xin cái gì.

exercises.question: I believed………….what he said.
exercises.explanation: believe in sb/sth = tin vào ai/cái gì.

exercises.question: The car finally broke……………after it had run for 10 years.
exercises.explanation: break down = (máy móc, xe cộ) hỏng hóc.

exercises.question: I don't care ………….whether he approves or disapproves
exercises.explanation: care about sth = bận tâm, lo lắng về điều gì.

exercises.question: The mud adhered………my shoes
exercises.explanation: adhere to sth = dính chặt vào, bám vào.

exercises.question: The government has just………………a new law making it illegal for shops to sell cigarettes to children under sixteen
exercises.explanation: bring in a law = ban hành một đạo luật mới.

exercises.question: How did the robbers manage to ……….without anyone seeing them?
exercises.explanation: break away = trốn thoát, ly khai.

exercises.question: A sip of brandy will …………him……..
exercises.explanation: bring someone round = làm cho ai tỉnh lại.

exercises.question: We shall have to ………..this matter ……..at the next meeting
exercises.explanation: bring up a matter/subject = đề xuất, đưa ra thảo luận.

exercises.question: They have carried…… four first prizes
exercises.explanation: carry off = đoạt được giải thưởng.

exercises.question: My family is the most important thing in my life. I won't let my work ………me and my family.
exercises.explanation: come between sb and sb = can thiệp, xen vào giữa mối quan hệ.

exercises.question: The real problem is how we are going to dispose ……………….the waste.
exercises.explanation: dispose of sth = vứt bỏ, xử lý cái gì.

exercises.question: They should………………with these silly regulations.
exercises.explanation: do away with sth = bãi bỏ, xóa bỏ cái gì.

exercises.question: The final questions went on and on and ………….out the meeting for another hour
exercises.explanation: draw out = kéo dài thời gian.

exercises.question: I used to be a member of the tennis club but I never found the time to play so I….. out after a while
exercises.explanation: drop out = rút tên khỏi danh sách, từ bỏ giữa chừng.

exercises.question: We decided to …….. from the main party and form a new party of our own called the 'Lunatic Party'
exercises.explanation: break away = trốn thoát, tách ra khỏi một nhóm.

exercises.question: I hope I can …………... Tom from leaving
exercises.explanation: discourage someone from doing something = ngăn cản ai làm việc gì.

exercises.question: A new magazine has just ……………..out
exercises.explanation: come out = xuất bản, lộ ra.

exercises.question: I love to dress ………….. for a party
exercises.explanation: dress up = diện quần áo đẹp.

exercises.question: Please dream ………….. a solution for this problem.
exercises.explanation: dream up = tự vạch ra, tưởng tượng ra kế hoạch.

exercises.question: At the meeting, someone brought.............. the subject of pre-school education.
exercises.explanation: bring up a subject = đề xuất một chủ đề thảo luận.

exercises.question: In their latest attack, terrorists have attempted to blow _________ the bridge
exercises.explanation: blow up = làm nổ tung.

exercises.question: There are many conservation efforts have been carried _______ to save endangered species
exercises.explanation: carry out = tiến hành, thực hiện.

exercises.question: The Second World War ______ in 1939.
exercises.explanation: break out = (chiến tranh, bệnh dịch) bùng nổ.

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Cụm Động Từ 2
exerciseSets.description: 20 câu — agree with, call off, come up with, cut in, die of, bring out, drop in on...

exercises.question: I don't agree …… you at all about that
exercises.explanation: agree with sb = đồng ý với ai.

exercises.question: Because of a heavy downpour, the proposed open-air concert had to be ……..
exercises.explanation: call off = hủy bỏ sự kiện.

exercises.question: I wonder who first ………… the idea of wearing seatbelts in cars
exercises.explanation: come up with an idea = nảy ra, nghĩ ra ý tưởng.

exercises.question: Please add some more hot water …… my tea!
exercises.explanation: add to = thêm vào, làm tăng lên.

exercises.question: Please …………! Make yourself at home
exercises.explanation: come in = mời vào.

exercises.question: I wish you wouldn't …… while I am talking
exercises.explanation: cut in = nói chen vào cuộc nói chuyện.

exercises.question: Go on in front, I'll soon ……….. you …………..
exercises.explanation: catch up with / catch someone up = đuổi kịp ai đó.

exercises.question: A lot of the restrictions on imports have been………..
exercises.explanation: do away with = bãi bỏ, loại bỏ.

exercises.question: He died….. cancer
exercises.explanation: die of a disease = chết vì bệnh gì.

exercises.question: Vehicles also account…………..air pollution in the cities
exercises.explanation: account for = chiếm (tỷ lệ), giải thích.

exercises.question: The police blamed the mother……….neglecting her child
exercises.explanation: blame someone for doing something = đổ lỗi cho ai vì làm gì.

exercises.question: If you don't have a healthy life, you should abstain …………drinking
exercises.explanation: abstain from doing something = kiêng cữ làm việc gì.

exercises.question: They're going to……………….a book of Peter's poems in the autumn
exercises.explanation: bring out = xuất bản.

exercises.question: When my grandmother died, I……………….quite a lot of money
exercises.explanation: come into = thừa kế, thừa hưởng tiền tài.

exercises.question: I'm sorry I'm late, but my car ……on the way here, so I had to phone for a taxi.
exercises.explanation: break down = (xe cộ, động cơ) hỏng hóc giữa đường.

exercises.question: If you intend to visit Aunt Pamela, phone her first. She doesn't like people to ______ her unexpectedly.
exercises.explanation: drop in on someone = tạt vào chơi, ghé thăm đột xuất.

exercises.question: If you really want to save money, you should cut ______ your spending.
exercises.explanation: cut down on = cắt giảm.

exercises.question: It was while I was clearing out the attic that I ……… some old photos of my sister's wedding
exercises.explanation: come across = vô tình bắt gặp.

exercises.question: Last week, I bumped……….. an old college friend I hadn't seen in years
exercises.explanation: bump into = tình cờ gặp ai đó.

exercises.question: I'll deal ……………… decimals in the next lesson.
exercises.explanation: deal with = bàn về, đối phó, xử lý chủ đề nào đó.

exerciseSets.title: Thi Online: Cụm Động Từ 1
exerciseSets.description: 34 câu — get off, fill in, go off, go on, give up, get over, hand down, fall for...

exercises.question: Take the bus number 7 and get __________ at Forest Road.
exercises.explanation: get off = xuống xe buýt/tàu.

exercises.question: If you want to join this club, you must__________ this application form.
exercises.explanation: fill in = điền thông tin vào đơn.

exercises.question: The bomb_______ when he rang the bell.
exercises.explanation: go off = (bom) phát nổ, (chuông) reo.

exercises.question: He _______ about his new car all the time.
exercises.explanation: go on about = nói liên tục về điều gì đó một cách phiền phức.

exercises.question: Do you think you could _______ this work with me some time, Peter?
exercises.explanation: go over = kiểm tra, xem lại kỹ lưỡng.

exercises.question: We have permission to_______ with the plan.
exercises.explanation: go ahead = tiến hành, bắt đầu làm việc gì.

exercises.question: I see the price of bread has _______ again.
exercises.explanation: go up = tăng giá.

exercises.question: There was a power cut and all the lights _______.
exercises.explanation: go out = mất điện, (đèn) tắt.

exercises.question: My father still hasn't really_________ the death of my mother.
exercises.explanation: get over = vượt qua (nỗi buồn, căn bệnh).

exercises.question: Bill seems unhappy in his job because he doesn't get _______ his boss.
exercises.explanation: get on well with sb = hòa thuận, có quan hệ tốt với ai.

exercises.question: My father gave_________ smoking two years ago.
exercises.explanation: give up = từ bỏ thói quen.

exercises.question: Billy hasn't been working; he won't………. his examinations.
exercises.explanation: get through = thi đỗ, vượt qua kỳ thi.

exercises.question: If you really want to lose weight, you need to ______ eating desserts.
exercises.explanation: give up = từ bỏ.

exercises.question: It's time I got _____ thinking about that essay.
exercises.explanation: get down to = bắt đầu tập trung làm gì một cách nghiêm túc.

exercises.question: They've fixed ____ Paris for their honeymoon.
exercises.explanation: fix on = quyết định chọn địa điểm/phương án.

exercises.question: Most of his clothes were handed _____ to him by his older brother.
exercises.explanation: hand down = truyền lại, để lại.

exercises.question: I tried to get my point _______, but nobody seemed to care.
exercises.explanation: get across = truyền đạt thành công ý kiến/thông điệp.

exercises.question: I cannot go ______ with his suggestion.
exercises.explanation: go along with = đồng tình, chấp nhận gợi ý.

exercises.question: There's a lot of stock missing. I wonder how he will try to ______ that away
exercises.explanation: explain away = thanh minh, giải thích để giảm nhẹ lỗi lầm.

exercises.question: I find that I have too much work. It's _______ into my spare time and I don't stand for that.
exercises.explanation: eat into = ăn lẹm vào, tiêu phí thời gian rảnh rỗi.

exercises.question: Before we _ upon a new project, I think we should completely finish the present one.
exercises.explanation: embark upon = bắt tay vào dự án mới.

exercises.question: Well it may have been Harry who was responsible for the mistake but Simon and Tony were _____ him on.
exercises.explanation: egg someone on = xúi giục, kích động ai làm điều xấu.

exercises.question: Could you __ upon what you have just said?
exercises.explanation: enlarge on/upon = diễn giải rộng ra, chi tiết hơn.

exercises.question: He leaned back, exulting _____ the success of his plan.
exercises.explanation: exult at/in = hoan hỉ, vô cùng sung sướng vì cái gì.

exercises.question: Thieves jacked _____ the car and stole the wheels.
exercises.explanation: jack up = dùng kích để nâng xe lên.

exercises.question: My husband jollied me _____ to finish writing my novel.
exercises.explanation: jolly someone along = khuyến khích, động viên nhẹ nhàng.

exercises.question: In a TV interview she hit _____ at her critics.
exercises.explanation: hit back = phản kích, phản đòn lại.

exercises.question: I'm surprised you _______ that trick.
exercises.explanation: fall for = bị lừa bởi một mánh khóe.

exercises.question: We still have a long way to go before we __ all the current financial difficulties.
exercises.explanation: iron out = tháo gỡ, giải quyết các khó khăn.

exercises.question: She had to face _____ the fact that she would never walk again.
exercises.explanation: face up to = dũng cảm chấp nhận, đối mặt với sự thật phũ phàng.

exercises.question: He was ______ for manslaughter.
exercises.explanation: have up = đưa ai đó ra tòa xét xử.

exercises.question: I haven't heard anything _____ her for months.
exercises.explanation: hear from sb = nhận thông tin, nghe tin tức từ ai.

exercises.question: When I bought the house, my sister _______ with a loan.
exercises.explanation: help someone out = giúp đỡ ai trong lúc khó khăn.

exercises.question: At first the show seemed kind of weird, but it _______ us.
exercises.explanation: grow on someone = dần dần khiến ai đó thích hơn.

exerciseSets.title: Thi Online: Cụm Động Từ 2
exerciseSets.description: 28 câu — fall out, get away, join up, go off, fall through, hold up, jump at, ice over...

exercises.question: You look upset, Sven. Have you and Niger _______ again?
exercises.explanation: fall out = cãi vã, bất hòa với ai.

exercises.question: Do you want to stop in this town, or shall we _______?
exercises.explanation: go on = tiếp tục hành trình.

exercises.question: I need to_______ from work and take a holiday.
exercises.explanation: get away = xin nghỉ phép, tránh đi đâu đó thư giãn.

exercises.question: He ______ the club on recommendation from his friend Jack.
exercises.explanation: join up = gia nhập thành viên.

exercises.question: He _______ unleaded gas and kept on his journey.
exercises.explanation: fill up with = đổ đầy nhiên liệu.

exercises.question: I am late because my alarm clock didn't _______ this morning.
exercises.explanation: go off = (đồng hồ báo thức) reo, đổ chuông.

exercises.question: Though being made with great carefulness, all his plans for starting his business fell __.
exercises.explanation: fall through = (kế hoạch) thất bại, sụp đổ.

exercises.question: There was a big hole in the road which _______ the traffic.
exercises.explanation: hold up = trì hoãn, làm ách tắc.

exercises.question: There is no food left. Someone must have finished it _______ .
exercises.explanation: finish up = ăn sạch, hoàn tất cái gì đó.

exercises.question: She should have been here but she's gone _______ flu.
exercises.explanation: go down with = bị ốm vì căn bệnh lây nhiễm nào đó.

exercises.question: Sarah wanted to be an actress, so when they offered her a part in the play, she _______ it.
exercises.explanation: jump at = chớp lấy cơ hội ngay lập tức.

exercises.question: I didn't want to do it, but the other boys egged me on. 'egged me on' means _______.
exercises.explanation: egg someone on = xúi giục, khuyến khích làm điều gì.

exercises.question: They're not trustworthy. I don't think we should __ into any agreement with them.
exercises.explanation: enter into an agreement = ký kết một thỏa thuận.

exercises.question: Although I was supposed to be the guest, he had mislaid his wallet and I ______ up paying for the meal.
exercises.explanation: end up = rốt cuộc phải làm gì.

exercises.question: They _______ out all the obvious problems at the first committee meeting.
exercises.explanation: iron out = giải quyết và tháo gỡ khó khăn.

exercises.question: He ______ up the folk tune.
exercises.explanation: jazz up = làm cho sinh động, bắt mắt hơn.

exercises.question: I can't wait for the river to ________ so we can do some ice fishing.
exercises.explanation: ice over = đóng băng bề mặt.

exercises.question: They ________ the days away, talking and watching television.
exercises.explanation: idle away = phung phí thời gian rảnh rỗi.

exercises.question: He never allowed his work to impinge ______ his private life.
exercises.explanation: impinge on = tác động tiêu cực, lấn chiếm.

exercises.question: We've certainly improved _____ last year's figures.
exercises.explanation: improve on = cải tiến, làm tốt hơn thành tích trước đó.

exercises.question: The deal _______ when we failed to agree on a price.
exercises.explanation: fall apart = sụp đổ, thất bại hoàn toàn.

exercises.question: I really felt _____ her when her husband died.
exercises.explanation: feel for sb = đồng cảm, thương hại cho hoàn cảnh của ai.

exercises.question: She spent an hour trying to install the software, but John finally _____ it out.
exercises.explanation: figure out = tìm ra giải pháp, tính toán thành công.

exercises.question: The flowers _______ a fragrant perfume.
exercises.explanation: give off = tỏa ra mùi hương/ánh sáng.

exerciseSets.title: Đề Luyện Tập Tổng Hợp (50 câu)
exerciseSets.description: 50 câu tổng hợp — put off, turn down, take on, look after, put up with, take over, run out of, stand out...

exercises.question: I haven't time to speak to him now, you'll have to put him............
exercises.explanation: put off = trì hoãn cuộc hẹn.

exercises.question: The job offer was too good for him to turn.....
exercises.explanation: turn down = từ chối một lời đề nghị.

exercises.question: The doctor advised me not to take..........so much work in future
exercises.explanation: take on = gánh vác, đảm nhận công việc.

exercises.question: The police have warned tourists to look...... for pickpockets in the town centre
exercises.explanation: look out for = chú ý cảnh giác, coi chừng.

exercises.question: Their aim is to....... up a new political party.
exercises.explanation: set up = lập nên, dựng nên, kiến lập.

exercises.question: We expected him at eight but he finally...... at midnight.
exercises.explanation: turn up = đến nơi, xuất hiện.

exercises.question: If you want to have a pet, you must be ready to look ........it for several years.
exercises.explanation: look after = chăm sóc.

exercises.question: I can put .......with most things but I cannot stand noisy children.
exercises.explanation: put up with = chịu đựng điều phiền phức.

exercises.question: My uncle took .....golf when he retired from work.
exercises.explanation: take up = bắt đầu sở thích/môn thể thao mới.

exercises.question: Mrs Brown always.......... out in a crowd because she wore a large hat
exercises.explanation: stand out = nổi trội, nổi bật.

exercises.question: All the plans have been put........ for the time being.
exercises.explanation: put aside = cất đi, hoãn làm.

exercises.question: Although the team was both mentally and physically exhausted, they ________ on walking.
exercises.explanation: keep on doing sth = tiếp tục hành động.

exercises.question: Before the plane ________ off, the flight attendant told everyone to fasten their seat belts...
exercises.explanation: take off = (máy bay) cất cánh.

exercises.question: Do you think it's possible to....... on nothing but fruit and vegetables?
exercises.explanation: live on = sinh sống dựa trên nguồn thực phẩm nào đó.

exercises.question: The child was........... by a lorry in the main street.
exercises.explanation: knock down = đâm quỵ xuống đường.

exercises.question: We're having terrible weather. Just can't put ......... it for much longer.
exercises.explanation: put up with = chịu đựng.

exercises.question: It's very cold in here. Do you mind if I put......... the heating?
exercises.explanation: put on = bật thiết bị nhiệt/mặc quần áo.

exercises.question: There's a rumor that the National Bank is going to take .......the company I work for.
exercises.explanation: take over = tiếp quản, mua lại công ty khác.

exercises.question: She …………..her father; everyone says how alike they are!
exercises.explanation: take after = trông giống ai (người trong gia đình).

exercises.question: Paul, do you think you could……………me…………for the night?
exercises.explanation: put up = cho ai ngủ nhờ, trú ngụ qua đêm.

exercises.question: The doctor asked me to…………..my shirt
exercises.explanation: take off = cởi bỏ quần áo.

exercises.question: Who will………..your child while you go out to work?
exercises.explanation: look after = trông nom, săn sóc.

exercises.question: Please ……………….the light, it's getting dark here
exercises.explanation: turn on = bật đèn lên.

exercises.question: It's cold outside. ………..your coat
exercises.explanation: put on = mặc áo khoác.

exercises.question: You can …….the new words in the dictionary
exercises.explanation: look up = tra cứu.

exercises.question: I'll be back in a minute, Jane. I just want to try out my new tape recorder. 'try out' means:
exercises.explanation: try out = chạy thử nghiệm.

exercises.question: Jane never turns up on time for a meeting. 'turns up' means:
exercises.explanation: turn up = xuất hiện, đến nơi.

exercises.question: Did Mr. Tan………. the class while Miss Fiona was ill in hospital?
exercises.explanation: take over = tiếp quản, cáng đáng thay.

exercises.question: Please _______ the radio, I can't concentrate on my work
exercises.explanation: turn off = tắt đài.

exercises.question: I always run .......of money before the end of the month.
exercises.explanation: run out of = hết sạch thứ gì.

exercises.question: Her father is always paying…………..to settle her bills
exercises.explanation: pay out = chi trả tiền bạc.

exercises.question: I take....... everything I said about Paul. I realize now that it wasn't true.
exercises.explanation: take back = rút lại lời nói.

exercises.question: Although I'd never made a sandwich before, my first attempt turned ...........quite well.
exercises.explanation: turn out = hóa ra là, kết quả diễn ra thành công.

exercises.question: It'll take me three years to............. up enough money to travel round the country.
exercises.explanation: save up = tiết kiệm gom góp tiền.

exercises.question: It was so foggy that the climbers couldn't.......... out the nearby shelter.
exercises.explanation: make out = nhìn thấy rõ, nhận diện ra.

exercises.question: They've _____ a new tower where that old building used to be.
exercises.explanation: put up = xây dựng lên một tòa nhà.

exercises.question: The explosion has caused us a lot of problems. It has probably set us……….. by a year or more
exercises.explanation: set back = trì hoãn, làm chậm tiến độ.

exercises.question: There is no smoking in this building. Please ………….it………..
exercises.explanation: put out = dập tắt (đầu thuốc, ngọn lửa).

exercises.question: We worked…..how much of our salaries we would have to save each year.
exercises.explanation: work out = tính toán, tìm ra phương pháp.

exercises.question: How many people do you expect to……………… at the meeting tonight?
exercises.explanation: show up = xuất hiện, hiện diện.

exercises.question: There are some pens here. Why don't you …………one or two?
exercises.explanation: pick out = chọn lựa ra.

exercises.question: Those three letters are an abbreviation. They ………….for something.
exercises.explanation: stand for = đại diện cho, viết tắt cho.

exercises.question: I don't see how you can ………..with such bad working conditions.
exercises.explanation: put up with = chịu đựng.

exercises.question: The truth turned …… to be stranger than we had expected
exercises.explanation: turn out = hóa ra.

exercises.question: I've bought a new dress but I haven't …….it on
exercises.explanation: try on = mặc thử quần áo.

exercises.question: Everyone in the class was so clever that I couldn't …….up with them.
exercises.explanation: keep up with = bắt kịp, theo kịp.
